# Subject Line Scorer

> A free tool that scores cold email subject lines instantly — rates deliverability, curiosity, personalisation, and spam risk on a 0-100 scale.

## What this tool does
- Input: your email subject line
- Output: score out of 100 with breakdown across 4 dimensions (deliverability, curiosity, personalisation, spam risk)
- Instant feedback with suggestions to improve
- No signup required, runs entirely in the browser

## Who built this
Built by Sachin Rai, enterprise sales professional at Freshworks.
Sachin builds AI-powered sales tools for B2B outreach.

## How to use this tool
Navigate to the main page, type or paste your subject line, and click Score.
The tool returns a score with dimension breakdown and improvement tips.

## Contact
For questions, collaborations, or feedback: sachinai1981@gmail.com
